refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, detect obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and testability: terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation are distinct but collectively fulfill the overall mapping requirement.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-function by comparing generated terrain models against surveyed data, obstacle detection accuracy via ground truth, and work-zone representation correctness via stakeholder validation.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Generate and maintain an accurate work-zone representation.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification and terrain feature extraction.
DP3: Employ a geospatial database to store and update the work-zone model.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: The sensor fusion approach logically integrates terrain and obstacle data, minimizing cross-module dependencies by centralizing raw data acquisition.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in all worksite conditions.
Risk of sensor data degradation due to environmental factors (dust, weather).
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding redundancy or alternative sensing methods to mitigate sensor failure risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Central processing and data fusion for worksite mapping and modeling.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams from Vehicle sensors.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with Safety Services and remote monitoring.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of worksite mapping logic and data fusion; low diffusion as interfaces are well-defined.
Limited containment; mostly sensor data source and actuator execution; higher diffusion if mapping logic placed here.
Minimal containment; primarily user interface and control; high diffusion risk if mapping logic included.
Not relevant for mapping; inclusion would cause high diffusion and poor containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the worksite mapping and modeling functions within the NGHE Solution module maximizes containment and minimizes diffusion, enabling clear ownership and interface management.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes overloaded with data processing.
Dependency on reliable telemetry data from Vehicle module.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor processing load and consider modularizing sensor data preprocessing if performance issues arise.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (sensor fusion) logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as mapping logic is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
Interfaces are well-defined and limited in number.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution for implementation, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data validation and stakeholder feedback on worksite model accuracy.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to DP and IM with explicit interfaces supports traceability and ownership.

recommended_revisions: Consider adding fallback sensing methods to address sensor reliability risks.
Plan for performance monitoring of NGHE Solution module.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements with acceptable risk and architectural clarity. No further decomposition is needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Generate and maintain an accurate work-zone representation.

revise.why: Current artifacts are consistent and meet criteria; no revision required now.

assumptions: Sensor data from Vehicle is reliable and timely.
NGHE Solution module has sufficient processing capacity.
open_risks: Sensor degradation due to environmental conditions.
Potential processing bottlenecks in NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Sensor performance data under varied conditions.
Processing load benchmarks for NGHE Solution module.
